transcript: AI: चलो English practice करते हैं। [Let's practice English.] Human: हाँ हाँ, okay. [Yes yes, okay.] AI: तुम्हारा नाम क्या है? [What is your name?] Human: I name is Rahul. AI: I name Rahul नहीं, My name is Rahul होगा। [Not "I name Rahul", it will be "My name is Rahul".] Human: हाँ, sorry. My name is Rahul. I'm not so good English. AI: तुम्हें बोलना चाहिए, My English isn't that good. [You should say, "My English isn't that good."] Human: हाँ हाँ, my English isn't that good. AI: तुमने इस हफ्ते कितनी देर English practice की? [How long did you practice English this week?] Human: मैं तो book पढ़कर ही English सीखता हूँ, क्योंकि मेरे पास practice करने के लिए कोई नहीं है। [I learn English just by reading books, because I have no one to practice with.] AI: Book पढ़ना अच्छी बात है, लेकिन अगर तुम्हें अच्छी English बोलनी है, तो daily practice करना ज़रूरी है। इसीलिए, तुम MySivi पर मेरे साथ हर दिन 10-15 minutes practice कर सकते हो। और कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी English improve हो जाएगी। [Reading books is good, but if you want to speak good English, daily practice is necessary. That's why you can practice with me on MySivi for 10-15 minutes every day. And in just a few days, your English will improve.] Human: पर मेरे पास इतने पैसे भी नहीं हैं। [But I don't have that much money either.] AI: कोई problem नहीं। तुम सिर्फ एक रुपये में शुरू कर सकते हो। [No problem. You can start for just one rupee.] Human: Wow! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Wow! Then how do I start?] AI: बस install का button click करो, MySivi app install करो और अपनी English journey शुरू करो। [Just click the install button, install the MySivi app, and start your English journey.] Voiceover: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Chalo English [Let's English], kya hai? [what is?], I name is Rahul, My name is Rahul, Tume bolna chahiye [You should say], My English Isn't that good., Tumne is hafte [You this week], kitni der English [how long English], practice ki? [practiced?], MySivi, 10-15 MINUTES har din 10-15 [10-15 MINUTES every day 10-15], me tumhari English [your English in], improve ho jayegi. [will improve.], Koi problem nahi. [No problem.], Tum sirf ek rupay [You only one rupee], me shuru kar sakte [can start in], ho, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime., 1,200 learners purchased today, Teacher, Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, Phir shuru kaise [Then how to start], karu? [do?], Bas install ka [Just click install], button click, MySivi app install, karo aur apni [do and your], English journey, shuru karo [start], MySivi AI English Speaking..., Install, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a student's English grammar mistakes in a split-screen conversation. The AI highlights the importance of daily practice and pitches the MySivi app as an affordable solution starting at just ₹1. The ad ends with a call to install the app.
